Codex independently verified that the 6 test_AC_07-12 files are absent from baseline diff and baseline_dirty_snapshot contains only a free-text disclaimer. Observations: AC-04 subprocess fixtures are adequate (no return-code check, but fresh temp paths + JSON structure validation); generated AC-06 test does not execute canary (QA supplemented with runtime bash canary-verify.sh exit 0 check); canary 'advisory only' is NOT a band-aid for AC-06 (write/git guards still emit_failure + exit 2); no role-token / band-aid in modified source; no Dimension 5 drift.
